data.title: 国际服 超电磁炮T联动特别PV 佐天泪子
data.summary: Student from another world, special video episode 3! Here is special in-game footage of Saten Ruiko!
data.body:
Student from another world, special video episode 3!
Here is special in-game footage of Saten Ruiko!

She goes for a nice swing at the robots flying toward her,
and deals damage to enemies in a straight line!

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
[https://youtu.be/vEJEYdaGVqU](https://youtu.be/vEJEYdaGVqU)

#BlueArchive
